metadata.title: Personal Banking | Bank Accounts | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank offers the largest range of Riba-free Deposit accounts for Personal Banking. You can choose from our current and savings accounts, our Special savings accounts or our Meezan Asaan accounts.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Meezan Bank Accounts The Largest Range of Riba-free Accounts for Personal Banking If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print 5 Unique Accounts for your Personal Banking Needs Meezan Bank offers the largest range of Riba-free Deposit accounts for Personal Banking. You can choose from our Current and Savings accounts, Special savings accounts, Meezan asaan accounts or Meezan express accounts. Account Opening Documents Account Opening Process Current Accounts Bank Accounts that are Safe and Secure You can open four different types of current accounts with us, both in local and foreign currency Rupee Account Learn More Dollar Account Learn More Euro Account Learn More GBP Account Learn More Savings Accounts Bank Accounts with Truly Halal Savings different types of savings Account Learn More Special Accounts Bank Accounts suitable for Your Various Saving Needs We offer six unique types of special savings accounts to suit your various requirements Meezan Bachat Account Learn More Labbaik Account Learn More Senior Citizen Account Learn More Meezan Plus Learn More Meezan Teens Club Learn More Meezan Kids Learn More Meezan Asaan Accounts Banking at its Simplest You can open three types of asaan both in local currency Asaan Current Learn More Asaan Savings Learn More Asaan Remittance Learn More Meezan Roshan Resident Account A special account for Resident Pakistanis with declared assets abroad, as per latest tax returns Offered in both Current & Savings accounts Roshan Resident Account Learn More Home Remittance Accounts Facilitating Home Remittances You can open five types of Remittance accounts with us Sohni Dharti Remittance Learn More Express Current Learn More Express Savings Learn More Smart Remittance Wallet Learn More Roshan Digital Learn More Meezan Smart Branchless Banking - Banked the unbanked Smart Wallet Current Learn More Smart Wallet Learn More Smart Disbursement Solution Learn More Smart Asaan Mobile Account Learn More Invest in Shariah-compliant shares listed on Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) by opening an account in Central Depository Company (CDC) Resident Pakistanis can invest their money Depository Company (CDC) through their PKR- Current / Savings Account maintained with Meezan Bank Limited. This is a great opportunity for Resident Pakistanis to invest in Pakistan’s capital marketplace and avail the Shariah-compliant returns through PSX while participating in the economic growth of Pakistan. Customer can choose from an extensive variety of Shariah-compliant companies listed on PSX in numerous sectors, design their investments portfolio and gain rewards by making investments in PSX.
